case_title: ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. VS ZAHI, HUI BIN INDV.-Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAHI, HUI BIN INDV.-Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, PHILIP INDV.- Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFT, ZHAI--SERVICE UNTIMELY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAHI, HUI BIN INDV.-Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE YEE, PHILIP INDV.- Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE $3,422.00 PRINCIPAL, $172.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,594.00, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO APPEAR. BOTH DEFENDANTS FILED LATE REQUESTS FOR A CONTINUANCE. BOTH REQUESTS ARE DENIED BECAUSE GOOD CAUSE WAS NOT SHOWN FOR THE DELAY IN FILING AND BECAUSE THE STATEMENTS OF DEFENDANTS ARE INCONSISTENT WITH THE DATES OF SERVICE INDICATED BY THE REGISTERED CALIFORNIA PROCESS SERVER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT ZHAI RE: PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY DEFT YEE--CHALLENGE TO SERVICE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,422.00 FILED BY ECONOMY RESTAURANT FIXTURES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAHI, HUI BIN INDV.-Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE YEE, PHILIP INDV.- Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFENDANT. (HEARING IS AUG 23,2005) 1 DAY BEFORE HEARING REQUEST. SENT TO COURT. ($10 FEE PAID BY CASH).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ZAHI, HUI BIN INDV.-Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE YEE, PHILIP INDV.- Y & Z LLC, DBA ARCHIE'S CAFE
